text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. Think of it as giving computers the power to learn, reason, and solve problems on their own. A key part of AI is machine learning, where systems learn from data instead of following explicit instructions. A more advanced type of this is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to learn patterns, much like the human brain. AI is already all around us in daily life. It powers recommendation systems on streaming services, voice assistants on our phones, and even traffic prediction apps that help us choose the fastest route.
